blockingIssues.description: The feature was marked completed even though its final handoff still reported `debug-emulator.yml` failing, so its required verification scope was incomplete.
The original emulator driver misdetected fresh AVDs as already having a device PIN, so it could skip `locksettings set-pin 0000` before fingerprint enrollment.
The original `screencap()` path had no `FLAG_SECURE` fallback, so the first system biometric prompt could abort the flow instead of producing `biometric-prompt-1.png`.
The original recovery-phrase step assumed the confirm CTA was immediately visible and tappable, but the real screen required scrolling to the `I’ve saved it` anchor.
Removing `|| true` without an always-run cleanup path left the `set -e` shell step able to exit before screenshots and final logcats were copied, so failed runs could lose debugging artifacts.
The final CI flow still uploads `recovery-phrase.xml` from the sensitive RecoveryPhrase screen, leaving mnemonic-bearing UI content in the GitHub Actions artifact.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated `android-flag-secure-native-module.md` to document the correct `reactApplicationContext.currentActivity?.runOnUiThread` access pattern for `FlagSecureModule`.
Updated `architecture.md` so the CI emulator flow notes the scroll-to-`I’ve saved it` RecoveryPhrase step instead of the stale 'tap Continue' wording.
Updated `ci-runner-push-blocker.md` with the successful `BinaryBuffer` / `KeyMaterialBytes` Droid-Shield workaround instead of the older rename-only guidance.
Updated `environment.md` with the Jest `crypto.subtle` / `src/lib/polyfills.ts` test-harness quirk discovered during the AbortSignal.timeout shim work.
Updated `user-testing.md` to note that `uiautomator dump` XML can leak sensitive text even when `FLAG_SECURE` blocks PNG screenshots, and that RecoveryPhrase XML must be redacted or skipped.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten the `followedProcedure` honesty gate so workers either prove the required mission/library reads plus red-first verification in the transcript, or explicitly record deviations. If small wrapper / push-unblock / config tasks are allowed to skip parts of that flow, document those exceptions in the skill.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: This same mismatch appeared across `fix-flag-secure-module-kotlin-compile`, `emulator-debug-flow-script`, `debug-emulator-workflow-update`, `run-ci-emulator-wrapper`, `fix-droid-shield-type-annotation-pattern`, `fix-deterministic-key-generator-sign-override`, and `polyfill-abortsignal-timeout`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add or automate a rule that a feature cannot be marked `completed` when its latest handoff is `partial`, `returnToOrchestrator: true`, or it explicitly leaves required verification undone.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: `fix-flag-secure-module-kotlin-compile` was marked completed in `features.json` even though its final handoff still reported `debug-emulator.yml` failing and returned control to the orchestrator.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that mission-specific `ci-runner` features may edit or push app/scripts code when the feature contract explicitly requires it, so the skill text does not conflict with the assigned work.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: `ci-end-to-end-run` explicitly told the worker to patch `scripts/emulator-debug-flow.py` and re-dispatch CI until green, while the current `ci-runner` skill still says not to edit or push app code.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Extend the secret-leak scan to uploaded UI-dump XML files, not just `logcat-*.txt`, because `uiautomator dump` can capture sensitive text even when `FLAG_SECURE` blocks screenshots.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The successful `ci-end-to-end-run` still uploaded a mnemonic-bearing `recovery-phrase.xml` artifact because the current `ci-runner` procedure scans logs but not the XML dumps it also requires workers to download.

rejectedObservations.observation: Per-feature notes that small shell-wrapper/config sessions lacked red-first steps or full mission/library reads.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate of the broader mobile-feature-worker honesty-gate recommendation above.

rejectedObservations.observation: The `fix-flag-secure-module-kotlin-compile` handoff pointed at a doc-only commit instead of the actual Kotlin-fix commit.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous as a systemic rule change from a single feature; preserved in the individual review report but not escalated in synthesis.
